blended.narrative: Granite Peak is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 563 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 24°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
